items.name_en: 【Exclusive Real Shot m14164 】This passport case is from the Louis Vuitton x Takashi Murakami reissue series, starting a fun journey with the artist's panda image. items.name_en: 【Exclusive Photo m13992 White】Takashi Murakami Collaboration Series. This zippy wallet is made of monogram canvas and is practical, featuring a spacious compartment, a zip coin pocket, and multiple credit card slots. items.name_en: 【Exclusive Photo m12961】This victorine wallet is a true collector's item from the exclusive 57th Street New York series, starring the brand's iconic mascot Vivienne. Made from iconic monogram coated canvas, it features a fun pattern that captures the vibrant New York lifestyle. The compact design offers smart organization, including a zip pocket for coins and six card slots. 12 x 9.5 x 2.5 cm (Length x Height x Width)

items.name_en: 【Exclusive Real Shot m14092 White Multicolor】This replica Louis Vuitton x Murakami series key pouch is made of monogram coated canvas and features playful rainbow tones, inspired by the passionate and lively aesthetics of Japanese artist Takashi Murakami. items.name_en: 【Exclusive Real Shot m13409 White Multicolor】This replica Louis Vuitton x Murakami series zip coin purse features a timeless design that blends practical functionality with playful style, adding vitality to the season. The coin purse is made of monogram coated canvas and features joyful rainbow tones, paying tribute to Takashi Murakami's iconic vivid color style. The coin purse has a silver zipper and multiple internal compartments, keeping coins, bills, and business cards neatly organized. 11 x 8.5 x 2 cm (Length x Height x Width)

items.name_en: 【Exclusive Real Shot g11299 White Multicolor】This Emily notebook cover is from the Louis Vuitton x Takashi Murakami collaboration series, playfully reinterpreting the brand's classic elements with Monogram Multicolor canvas. The elegant background features Murakami's aesthetic colorful prints, while the leather interior flap and replaceable design add artisanal details. It can be paired with the Jane notebook, making it an elegant choice for long-lasting companionship. 22.5 x 2 x 14 cm (Height x Width x Length)

items.name_en: 🌷Includes full original green box packaging🌷GG Marmont Wallet. This GG Marmont Wallet is crafted in classic and durable burgundy leather, adding a classic piece to the 'Aria' collection. The double-G hardware reinterprets the 1970s belt buckle design using matching resin material. The combination of classic design and monochrome colorway highlights a modern fashion style.
